'''Koromondain PDS, Incorporated''' was a manufacturer of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and other personal defense systems including [[stun cloak]]s, and [[wrist laser]]s.<ref name="GG10" />

Well-respected armor designer Dr. [[Nashiak Llalik]] occasionally collaborated with this company in different designs.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
